queries: backtesting trading strategy dashboard risk drawdown visualization best practices
paper trading simulation backtest dashboard UI risk bands drawdown
trading strategy backtesting out of sample testing slippage paper trading
takeaways: Trading research dashboards should surface drawdown, risk, and validation gates rather than only upside curves.
Backtest and paper-trading workflows are clearer when data quality, validation, slippage, and live-trading boundaries are visually separate.
For a reusable public repo, this minigame should make simulation state explicit and keep broker/API/real-money actions visually sealed.

imageGeneration.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: website game module background texture for a static dashboard minigame. Primary request: premium dark game UI background for a Paper Trial module about paper-only trading strategy research, backtesting, out-of-sample validation, slippage modeling, drawdown locks, and no-real-money gates. Scene/backdrop: futuristic quant simulation range with glowing backtest lanes, risk-band rails, drawdown barrier locks, historical-data tiles, paper-trade ghost orders, and a sealed live-trading vault gate. Subject: abstract paper-only trading lab, simulation tracks, equity-curve ribbons, risk shields, locked broker/API gate, validation checkpoints; no people. Style/medium: polished 3D game concept art, premium SaaS-game hybrid, precise and restrained. Composition/framing: wide landscape dashboard texture, dark calm center for UI overlays, richer detail along edges, no frame or border. Lighting/mood: cool analytical command center, blue and teal signal light with green validation accents and small amber warning locks. Color palette: dark charcoal, steel blue, cyan, teal, small green, restrained amber warning highlights, no dominant purple. Materials/textures: smoked glass, matte graphite, holographic charts, translucent risk bands, satin metal, soft volumetric glow. Constraints: no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark, no people, no brand marks, no currency symbols, no readable chart labels, avoid clutter in the center.

frontend: Added paper-trial dispatch in renderGameView and gameStepCount.
Added buildPaperTrialStages to derive five paper-trading simulation stages from lane trail text, counts, artifacts, traces, blockers, and gates.
Added renderPaperTrialGame and renderPaperStage with focused controls, trial verdict, animated simulation range, paper nodes, and stage cards.
Added responsive Paper Trial CSS for docked detail panels, stacked desktop, and mobile layouts.

commands: rg -n "[^\x00-\x7F]" web/index.html web/app.js web/styles.css web/README.md web/data/lane-visuals.json reports/agent-company-atlas-paper-trial-trace-metadata-20260617.json
